description: You are a Color Stylist at an animation studio. Recolor the character in the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' for a 'Night' sequence by modifying the Palette styles to dark, cool tones. The skin must be changed to Dark Blue-Grey (RGB: 60, 60, 90) and the clothing/shirt to Dark Purple/Indigo (RGB: 40, 30, 60), while keeping the line art black. Render the recolored animation as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/night_scene/'.
